options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats avg("cisco.content.five-seconds") as "5 Sec" avg("cisco.content.one-minute") as "1 Min" avg("cisco.content.five-minutes") as "5 Min" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id span=5m
| mstats latest("cisco.content.five-seconds") as cpu_5sec WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" span=5m | tail 1

| mstats latest("cisco.content.cpu-usage-processes.cpu-usage-process.five-seconds") as cpu WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | sort -cpu | head 10 | rename name as Process | fields Process cpu

| mstats avg("cisco.content.cpu-usage-processes.cpu-usage-process.five-seconds") as cpu WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | eventstats max(cpu) as peak BY name | sort -peak | where peak > 0 | head 200 | chart limit=5 avg(cpu) BY _time name

| mstats latest("cisco.content.total-memory") as "Total (MB)" latest("cisco.content.used-memory") as "Used (MB)" latest("cisco.content.free-memory") as "Free (MB)" latest("cisco.content.lowest-usage") as "Lowest Ever (MB)" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-memory-oper:memory-statistics/memory-statistic" cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id name | eval "Total (MB)"=round('Total (MB)'/1048576, 1) | eval "Used (MB)"=round('Used (MB)'/1048576, 1) | eval "Free (MB)"=round('Free (MB)'/1048576, 1) | eval "Lowest Ever (MB)"=round('Lowest Ever (MB)'/1048576, 1) | eval "Used %"=round('Used (MB)'/('Total (MB)')*100, 1) | rename cisco.node_id as Switch name as Pool | sort Switch Pool

| mstats latest("cisco.keys.name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-memory-oper*" cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Pool Name" | table Switch "Pool Name" | sort Switch "Pool Name"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.holding-memory") as holding_memory WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | eval holding_memory_mb = round(holding_memory / 1048576, 2) | sort -holding_memory_mb | head 10 | rename name as Process | fields Process holding_memory_mb

| mstats latest("cisco.content.allocated-memory") as allocated latest("cisco.content.freed-memory") as freed WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | eval "Allocated (GB)" = round(allocated / 1073741824, 2) | eval "Freed (GB)" = round(freed / 1073741824, 2) | fields _time name "Allocated (GB)" "Freed (GB)" | sort -"Allocated (GB)" | rename name as Process

| mstats avg("cisco.content.memory-stats.used-percent") as "Used %" avg("cisco.content.memory-stats.free-percent") as "Free %" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id span=5m

| mstats latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.used-percent") as "Used %" latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.total") as total_kb latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.free-number") as free_kb latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.used-number") as used_kb latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.committed-percent") as "Committed %" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY fru cisco.node_id | eval "Total (GB)"=round(total_kb/1048576, 2) | eval "Used (GB)"=round(used_kb/1048576, 2) | eval "Free (GB)"=round(free_kb/1048576, 2) | rename cisco.node_id as Switch fru as FRU | table Switch FRU "Total (GB)" "Used (GB)" "Free (GB)" "Used %" "Committed %" | sort Switch FRU

| mstats avg("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as reading WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where match(name, "(?i)temp") | chart limit=10 avg(reading) BY _time name

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as "Reading (W)" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name location cisco.node_id | where match(name, "(?i)power supply") | rename name as "Power Supply" location as Location cisco.node_id as Switch | table Switch "Power Supply" Location "Reading (W)" | sort Switch "Power Supply"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as "Reading (RPM)" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name location cisco.node_id | where match(name, "(?i)fan") | rename name as Fan location as Location cisco.node_id as Switch | table Switch Fan Location "Reading (RPM)" | sort Switch Fan

| mstats latest("cisco.content.stack-node.chassis-number") as "Chassis" latest("cisco.content.stack-node.latency") as "Latency" latest("cisco.content.stack-node.interface-mtu") as "MTU" latest("cisco.content.stack-node.mac-persistency-wait-time") as "MAC Persist Wait" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY chassis-number cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch chassis-number as "Chassis #" | table Switch "Chassis #" Chassis Latency MTU "MAC Persist Wait" | sort Switch "Chassis #"

| mstats avg("cisco.content.stack-node.keepalive-counters.sent") as Sent avg("cisco.content.stack-node.keepalive-counters.received") as Received avg("cisco.content.stack-node.keepalive-counters.sent-failure") as Failed WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY chassis-number span=5m

| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.hw-description_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id hw-type hw-dev-index value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch hw-type as "HW Type" hw-dev-index as Index value as Description | fields Switch "HW Type" Index Description | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.part-number_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id hw-type hw-dev-index value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch hw-type as "HW Type" hw-dev-index as Index value as "Part Number" | fields Switch "HW Type" Index "Part Number"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.serial-number_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id hw-type hw-dev-index value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch hw-type as "HW Type" hw-dev-index as Index value as "Serial Number" | fields Switch "HW Type" Index "Serial Number"] | stats values(Description) as Description values("Part Number") as "Part Number" values("Serial Number") as "Serial Number" BY Switch "HW Type" Index | sort Switch "HW Type" Index

| mstats latest("cisco.content.install-location-information.install-version-info.version_info") as v WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as Version | table Switch Version | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.ha-enabled") as "HA Enabled" latest("cisco.content.switchover-count") as "Switchover Count" latest("cisco.content.standby-failure-count") as "Standby Failures" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.ha-state_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "HA State" | fields Switch "HA State"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.last-switchover-reason_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Last Switchover Reason" | fields Switch "Last Switchover Reason"] | stats values("HA Enabled") as "HA Enabled" values("Switchover Count") as "Switchovers" values("Standby Failures") as "Standby Failures" values("HA State") as "HA State" values("Last Switchover Reason") as "Last Switchover" BY Switch | sort Switch

title: Cisco IOS XE — Infrastructure
description: CPU, Memory, DRAM, Environment, Stack, Hardware, HA
